response.step_by_step_log: 1. Audited the entire video for musical content. 2. Confirmed that the audio consists exclusively of conversational dialogue (Japanese) and Minecraft-style sound effects. 3. No vocal music was detected at any point in the video, so no song metadata or lyrics were searched for. 4. Segments were created based on the visual shift from exploration to the roulette wheel activity.
response.global_summary: A gameplay recording of a VTuber in a Minecraft-style game. The player explores the game world, prepares, and later engages in multiple rounds of a in-game gambling feature called 'Shishiro Roulette' with other players. There is no vocal or instrumental music in this video.

scenes.description: The player walks through a Minecraft-style environment, managing their inventory and moving towards a central area in the game map. No music plays.

The player gathers with other players around a large 'Shishiro Roulette' wheel. They take turns interacting with it as a gambling mechanic. There is no background music, only voice commentary and game sound effects.
